context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the oban-essentials instructions from the published Elixir Phoenix Skills plugin.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill before writing ANY Oban worker or enqueuing jobs.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Define worker module** — `use Oban.Worker` with explicit `queue`, `max_attempts`, and `unique` options

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Write tests** — use `Oban.Testing` with `assert_enqueued` and `perform_job`, covering all return paths

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Never put large data in job args** — store IDs and fetch fresh data in the worker — see [Job Args Best Practices](#job-args-best-practices)

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use `Oban.insert/1` (not `Oban.insert!/1`) and handle the error tuple — see [Enqueuing Jobs](#enqueuing-jobs)

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Return exactly one of these from `perform/1`. Use `{:error, reason}` for retryable failures; never raise.

checklist.name: instruction-7
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `perform_job/2`** — not `perform/1`. `perform_job` validates args and simulates the Oban runtime.

checklist.name: instruction-8
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `assert_enqueued/1`** — verify jobs were enqueued with correct args.

checklist.name: instruction-9
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Use `Oban.Testing` inline mode** in test config — jobs run synchronously in the test process.

checklist.name: instruction-10
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: report_data: large_data_structure  # Don't do this!
